description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Weight â; Price +1 Bonus DESCRIPTION This armor special ability works only for evil creatures with the challenge ability (such as cavaliers ) or the smite good ability (such as antipaladins, half-fiends, and creatures with the fiendish creature template). A wearer with one of these abilities gains a +2 profane bonus to AC against attacks from the chosen opponent. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells protection from good; Cost +1 bonus
